templates.title: Bold Magazine Close-Up
templates.description: A tight, glossy editorial portrait with statement accessories.
templates.prompt: Create a tight editorial beauty portrait of a stylish adult model wearing oversized translucent red sunglasses, glossy red lips, gold hoop earrings, and confident high-fashion styling. Use sharp studio lighting, realistic skin texture, close-up composition, a clean pale background, and premium magazine photography polish.
templates.creator: Open Image Templates

templates.title: Cozy Bedroom Selfie
templates.description: A warm, candid phone selfie with room ambience.
templates.prompt: Create a realistic casual bedroom selfie of an adult person resting their face on one hand and looking at the camera. Use warm lamp light, string lights, soft phone-camera realism, natural facial details, slight lived-in room background, and an intimate candid composition.
templates.creator: Open Image Templates

templates.title: Minimal Athleisure Studio
templates.description: A clean wellness or fitness lifestyle image.
templates.prompt: Create a realistic lifestyle fitness photo of an adult athlete wearing a clean white athleisure outfit in a bright minimal studio. The subject is posed in a relaxed floor stretch, with beige-white walls, soft sunlight, long shadows, natural skin tones, realistic fabric texture, and calm premium wellness brand styling.
templates.creator: Open Image Templates

templates.title: Streetwear Bus Stop Editorial
templates.description: Urban fashion photography with a candid editorial feel.
templates.prompt: Create a realistic streetwear editorial photo of a stylish adult model at an urban bus stop, wearing layered streetwear and sneakers. Use natural street light, candid pose, shallow depth of field, modern fashion-magazine composition, and subtle city background detail.
templates.creator: Open Image Templates

templates.title: Sunny Beach Product Shot
templates.description: A bright summer commercial image for a product.
templates.prompt: Create a bright commercial product photo of a yellow skincare tube standing in golden beach sand near the ocean. Add a crisp water splash, tropical leaves, and a small flower. Use sunny natural light, shallow depth of field, crisp product focus, realistic packaging material, and premium summer advertising composition. Keep label text minimal and graphic.
templates.creator: Open Image Templates

templates.title: Luxury Perfume Packshot
templates.description: A polished studio packshot for fragrance or cosmetics.

templates.creator: Open Image Templates

templates.title: Bright Bedroom Mirror Selfie
templates.description: A clean daylight mirror selfie with phone-camera realism.
templates.prompt: Create a realistic bright bedroom mirror selfie of an adult lifestyle model sitting on a white bed, holding a white phone up to a large grey marble framed mirror. templates.title: Turn Me Into A Collectible Figure
templates.description: A miniature figure and toy packaging scene.

Create a realistic product-style scene where that adult subject has been turned into a detailed collectible figure standing on a designer desk. Include a monitor showing a 3D character modeling view of the same figure, plus retail toy packaging with a clear plastic window. Use warm desk-lamp lighting, modern creative studio background, realistic plastic packaging, and premium collectible product photography.
